def remove_duplicates(nums):
    seen = set()
    result = []

            result.append(num)

class LRUCache:
    def __init__(self, capacity: int = None):
        self.cache = defaultdict(OrderedDict)
        self.capacity = capacity if capacity is not None else float('inf')
        self.head = ListNode()
        self.tail = ListNode()
        self.head.next = self.tail
        self.tail.prev = self.head
    def get(self, key: str) -> Any:

        if node is not None:

            self.move_to_end(node)
            return node.val
        return -1

    def put(self, key: str, value: Any) -> None:

            node = self.cache[key]
            node.val = value
            self.remove_node(node)
            self.move_to_end(node)
        else:

                evicted_key = self.remove_head()
                del self.cache[evicted_key]
            new_node = ListNode(key, value)

            self.add_to_end(new_node)

        node.prev.next = node.next
        node.next.prev = node.prev
        del node

    def add_to_end(self, node: ListNode) -> None:
        node.prev = self.tail
        node.next = self.tail.next
        self.tail.next.prev = node
        self.tail.next = node

    @staticmethod

        if self.head.next is not None:
            removed_node = self.head.next
            del self.cache[removed_node.key]
            return removed_node.key
        return None
}

       T1.name AS table_name,
       T2.field_name AS column_name,
       T3.table_name AS dependent_table_name,
       T4.foreign_key_id AS foreign_key_id,
       CASE WHEN T3.constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY' THEN T1.id ELSE NULL END AS unique_id
FROM table_original AS T1
JOIN original_table AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.original_column_id
LEFT JOIN dependent_table AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.dependent_column_id
LEFT JOIN constraint AS T4 ON T4.constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY' AND T4.table_name = T3.dependent_table_name
WHERE (T3.table_name, T4.constraint_type) NOT IN (
    SELECT T3.table_name, T4.constraint_type
    FROM dependency_table AS T3
    WHERE T4.table_name = T2.name AND T3.constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY' AND T2.id != T1.id
)
GROUP BY T1.id,
       T1.name,
       T2.field_name,
       T3.table_name,
       T4.foreign_key_id,
       CASE WHEN T3.table_name, T4.constraint_type) NOT IN (
        SELECT T3.table_name, T4.constraint_type
        FROM dependency_table AS T3
        WHERE T4.table_name = T2.name AND T3.constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY' AND T2.id != T1.id
    )
ORDER BY T1.name, T1.id
```

#!/bin/bash
def get_section(section_name)
{    local lines=($(cat $section_name));
    for i in ${!lines[@]}; do
        line=${lines[i]}
        # Remove leading/trailing whitespace and convert to lowercase
        line=$(echo $line | sed 's/^[[:space:]]*//; s/[[:space:]]*$//; tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
        # Check if the line starts with a key-value pair
        if [[ $line =~ ^[a-zA-Z]+\s*= ]]; then
            echo ""$line""
        fi
    done
}

# Read configuration file
config_file=$1
if [ ! -f $config_file ]; then
    echo "File not found: $config_file" >&2
    exit 1
fi
def get_sections()
{    local lines=($(cat $config_file));
    for i in ${!lines[@]}; do
        line=${lines[i]}
        # Check if the line starts with a section header
        if [[ $line =~ ^# ]]; then
            echo ""$line""
            sections+=($i)
        fi
    done
    return
}

get_sections "$config_file"
groups=($(for i in ${!sections[@]}; do
    echo "section_${sections[i]}": get_section $sections[$i]
done));

# Print normalized summary of each section
for key in ${groups[@]}; do
    section_name=${key%_*}
    value=$(get_section $section_name)
    echo "$section_name" = "$value"
done
